text:
For Honor: Content of the Week - 18 June
Don't miss the Effect, Ornament, Signature, Executions and Outfits we're bringing back. Available until July 2nd!

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Content Of The Week - June 18
Don't miss the Effect, Ornament, Signature, Executions and Outfits we're bringing back. Available until July 2nd!

About For Honor:
Step into the battlefield to experience the chaos and glory found only in For Honor. 

Whether battling through a gripping campaign or clashing with others in intense multiplayer modes and PvP modes, players choose from history’s deadliest warriors, each from a fierce rival faction — the bold Knights, the brutal Vikings, the deadly Samurai, the fearsome Wu Lin, and the enigmatic Outlanders. 

For Honor is a fast-paced and immersive experience that continues to evolve with major gameplay updates, new Heroes, thrilling events, and more, keeping the conflict alive and ever challenging.

#Ubisoft #ForHonor 

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

© Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.

text:
The next French icon is almost here. 🇫🇷🥐🥖
Alpine is coming in #TheCrewMotorfest with Season 10

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Into the Dark - Narrative Cinematic
Agents, the Dark Zones are calling.

The Hyenas are tearing through D.C. with a stronger, more dangerous supply of Spice, spreading chaos and tightening their grip on the city. To fight back, Agents must return to the most dangerous corners of D.C.: the Dark Zones.

This is where the season begins.

The Division 2: Into the Dark out now.

About The Division 2:
Tom Clancy's The Division 2 is a shooter RPG with a thrilling campaign fully playable in co-op and multiple PVP modes.

In The Division 2, save your country in Washington, DC, and in the Warlords of New York expansion, hunt down Aaron Keener, a former Agent who has taken control of New York.

#Ubisoft #TheDivision2

About Ubisoft:
Ubisoft is a creator of worlds, committed to enriching players’ lives with original and memorable entertainment experiences. Ubisoft’s global teams create and develop a deep and diverse portfolio of games, featuring brands such as Assassin’s Creed®, Brawlhalla®, For Honor®, Far Cry®, Tom Clancy’s Ghost Recon®, Just Dance®, Rabbids®, Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six®, The Crew® and Tom Clancy’s The Division®. Through Ubisoft Connect, players can enjoy an ecosystem of services to enhance their gaming experience, get rewards and connect with friends across platforms. With Ubisoft+, the subscription service, they can access a growing catalog of more than 100 Ubisoft games and DLC. For the 2023-24 fiscal year, Ubisoft generated net bookings of €2.32 billion. To learn more, please visit: www.ubisoftgroup.com.

© 2024 Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.
